Current Operations

    Other Operations

  • Ecuadorian and U.S. Military Forces Launch Operations Against Narco-terrorists SOUTHCOM 03 Mar 2026 -- On March 3, Ecuadorian and U.S. military forces launched operations against Designated Terrorist Organizations in Ecuador.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Iran War Descends Into Regional Conflict With Global Spillovers RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- In just a few days, the United States and Israel's massive bombardment of Iran has sprawled into a regional war that has dragged in key America allies in the Middle East and sent global energy prices soaring.

  • US Announces War Objectives As Trump Says 'Something Had To Be Done' About Iran RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- The White House has outlined four objectives of its ongoing aerial assault against Iran, carried out in tandem with Israel, now in its fourth day.
  • Double 'Shock And Awe' -- US Pounds Iran With Massive Assets RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- The United States has destroyed 17 Iranian naval vessels - including a submarine - and struck nearly 2,000 targets across Iran in less than four days, according to the commander of US Central Command.
  • U.S. top general says more troops, fighter jets deployed to Middle East People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Caine said Monday that U.S. attacks on Iran are in their early stages and more U.S. troops and fighter jets are arriving in the Middle East, suggesting an extended campaign.
  • U.S. aircraft activity at Portugal's Azores base sparks controversy People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- Portugal's government faces growing criticism over U.S. military operations at Lajes Air Base in the Azores following attacks on Iran, with opposition parties and experts questioning whether proper authorization was obtained.
  • Kuwait says several U.S. warplanes crash, crews in stable condition People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- Several U.S. warplanes crashed on Monday morning, and all crew members survived, the Kuwaiti Ministry of Defense said in a statement posted on X.
  • What to know about regional repercussions of U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran? People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- The United States and Israel continued airstrikes on Iran on Monday, while Tehran retaliated against U.S. bases and Israeli targets in the Middle East, with violence spreading across the region. Civilians in the affected areas have expressed hopes for a swift ceasefire and a return to stability.

  • Iran's War Strategy: Raise Cost Of Conflict To Secure Eventual Cease-Fire RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- As United States and Israel wage war against Iran, Tehran is widening the theater of the conflict and raising the costs for Washington in a bid to secure an eventual cease-fire, experts say.
  • IRGC: 16th wave of retaliatory strikes hit heart of occupied territories; enemy casualties stand at 680 Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced execution of the 16th wave of its underway Operation True Promise 4 against renewed Israeli-American aggression towards the Islamic Republic.
  • Iran's air defense systems down six advanced Hermes drones Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian army has reported that its air defense systems successfully destroyed six advanced enemy drones over the last 24 hours as they were flying over the Iranian territory.
  • US defenses overwhelmed by Iran's drone and missile barrages: WSJ Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- Iran's constant firing of drones and missiles has clearly challenged the United States' ability to reach its military objectives in the country and its capability to defend allies and assets in West Asia, an analysis by the Wall Street Journal shows.
  • IRGC says second US THAAD anti-missile unit destroyed Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says its Aerospace Force has successfully targeted and neutralized a second US-operated Terminal High Altitude Area Defense (THAAD) system in West Asia.
  • Iran denies attacks on Oman as it warns of US-Israeli 'false-flag' ops Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The General Staff of the Armed Forces of Iran has denied any involvement in military strikes against the territory or ports of the Sultanate of Oman, following reports of drone attacks at the Duqm and Salalah ports.
  • Iran says committed to regional security; retaliatory attacks only target Israel, US assets Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters of the Iranian Armed Forces says Iran's retaliatory attacks are exclusively directed against Israeli and US assets, and that Tehran remains committed to safeguarding the national security and interests of neighboring countries.
  • IRGC: 650 casualties for US military in two days as Iran missiles force aircraft carrier to flee Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- A spokesman for the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says more than 650 US military personnel have been killed and wounded within the first two days of Iran's retaliatory Operation True Promise 4 by Iranian Armed Forces against US military installations and warships across West Asia.
  • New wave of attacks devastates key US base in Bahrain as Iran strikes back Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- A fresh wave of Iranian retaliatory strikes has crippled a major US air base in Bahrain, with strikes destroying command centers as Iranian forces continue launching firm response to the US-Israeli aggression.
  • US Embassy in Riyadh Attacked by 2 Drones - Saudi Defense Ministry Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- The US Embassy in Riyadh was attacked by two drones, the Saudi Arabian Defense Ministry said.
  • Iran destroys main command building, headquarters of US air base in Bahrain Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) says it has destroyed the main command building and headquarters of the US air base in Bahrain in the fourteenth wave of Operation "True Promise-4."
  • US embassy in Saudi capital set ablaze after drone attack: Riyadh Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The United States embassy in the Saudi Arabian capital, Riyadh, has been set ablaze after at least a pair of drones hit the premises of the American diplomatic mission, the Saudi defense ministry says.

  • Rubio Defends Iran Strikes, Warns 'Hardest Hits' Still to Come RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has defended Washington's decision to strike Iranian targets, describing the attacks as a preemptive move to protect American forces from what he called an "imminent threat," and warning that "the hardest hits are yet to come from the US military."
  • Rubio Claims There Was Imminent Threat From Iran Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said on Monday that there was an imminent threat from Iran.
  • US Allegedly Offered Fuel Swap For Iranian Halt On Uranium Enrichment - Witkoff Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- On Saturday, the United States and Israel launched strikes on targets in Iran, including in Tehran, causing damage and civilian casualties. Iran retaliated with strikes against Israeli territory, as well as against US military bases across the Middle East.
  • Meeks, Smith, Himes, McCollum, DeLauro Send Letter to Iran Briefers Demanding Direct Answers on U.S. Military Operations Against Iran. House Armed Services Committee - Democrats 03 Mar 2026 -- resentatives Gregory W. Meeks, Ranking Member of the House Foreign Affairs Committee; Adam Smith, Ranking Member of the House Armed Services Committee; Jim Himes, Ranking Member of the House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence; Rosa DeLauro; Ranking Member of the House Appropriations Committee; and Betty McCollum, Ranking Member of the House Appropriations Subcommittee on Defense sent a letter to top Trump administration officials set to brief Congress today.
  • Trump defends attacks on Iran, slams Democrats for "complaining bitterly" People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump on Monday defended the attacks on Iran as "very necessary and important," slamming Democrats for "complaining bitterly."
  • Trump says U.S. attack on Iran capable of going "far longer" than 4 to 5 weeks People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said Monday that the U.S. military campaign against Iran has "capability to go far longer" than the four to five weeks he projected during media interviews one day earlier.

  • PM Netanyahu visits Palmachim Airbase Israel - Prime Minister 03 Mar 2026 -- Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu visited the Palmachim Airbase today, accompanied by Minister of Defense Israel Katz and IDF Chief of Staff Lt. Gen. Eyal Zamir.
  • Netanyahu Says There Will Be No Endless War With Iran Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has said that there will be no endless war with Iran, but rather swift and decisive action.
  • FM Sa'ar briefs foreign ambassadors stationed in Israel Israel MFA 03 Mar 2026 -- FM Sa'ar: Following the Iraniam regime's attack on all its neighbors and the massacre of its own people - countries around the world must sever their ties with it."

  • Iran's firm response will last as long as attacks do: Envoy Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- Iran's ambassador to the United Nations has warned of firm self-defense as long as the US-Israeli aggression continues.
  • Shedding of American, Iranian blood on 'Israel firsters': Iran FM Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has sharply criticized the "Israel First" policy of the United States, asserting that the lives of both American and Iranian citizens are being sacrificed to serve the interests of the Zionist regime.
  • Iran condemns IAEA inaction as US-Israeli aggression targets nuclear facilities Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- The Head of the Atomic Energy Organization of Iran has issued a formal protest to IAEA Director General Rafael Grossi, demanding an immediate end to the agency's inaction following repeated military strikes against Iran's sovereign nuclear infrastructure.

  • Middle East crisis plays out worst fears; talks only way out OHCHR 03 Mar 2026 -- The fear, the panic, the anxiety experienced by millions of people in the Middle East and beyond is palpable - and was entirely avoidable. The situation is worsening and widening by the hour, playing out our worst fears.
  • UNHCR mobilizing across region as Middle East crisis escalates UNHCR 03 Mar 2026 -- Staff at UNHCR, the UN Refugee Agency, are mobilizing from Iran and Afghanistan to Lebanon and Syria to support people forced to flee their homes as the regional crisis intensifies.
  • UN Relief Chief: Middle East violence's humanitarian fallout "increasingly daunting" UNOCHA 03 Mar 2026 -- Statement by Tom Fletcher, Under-Secretary-General for Humanitarian Affairs and Emergency Relief Coordinator
  • WFP ready to scale up operations across the Middle East as displacement grows and supply routes come under strain WFP 03 Mar 2026 -- The humanitarian situation across the Middle East is changing quickly driven by ongoing security developments. The United Nations World Food Programme is operational, positioned, and ready to scale as needs grow. We have activated emergency preparedness measures across the region and we can move fast.
  • Iran crisis: Schoolgirls killed, thousands displaced and aid compromised UN News 03 Mar 2026 -- On the fourth day of Israeli and United States airstrikes against Iran and amid growing violence and instability in the Middle East, the UN urgently called for protection of civilians and warned of growing displacement and humanitarian needs.
  • IAEA finds no systematic Iran nuclear weapons program; China urges political-diplomatic path Global Times 03 Mar 2026 -- The US has once again launched attacks against Iran during the negotiation process, which violates international law and the basic norms of international relations, leading to a sudden escalation of the situation in the Middle East, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning said in response to a question asking China's take on the Iranian nuclear issue, on which the Director General of the IAEA Rafael Grossi stated that the IAEA has not seen a systematic nuclear weapons program in Iran, and that other countries may have their own political considerations.

  • Protecting civilians in armed conflicts is red line that must not be crossed, FM says regarding strikes against Iran Global Times 03 Mar 2026 -- Responding to a question regarding military strikes against Iran by the US and Israel, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning said on Tuesday that China is deeply saddened by the large number of civilian casualties caused by the conflict.
  • China urges all sides to cease military operations, safeguard safety of navigation in Strait of Hormuz, FM on claims of China pressuring Iran to keep Strait open Global Times 03 Mar 2026 -- When asked for comments on media reports claiming that China is pressuring Iranian officials to avoid actions that could disrupt Qatar's natural gas exports and other shipments passing through the Strait of Hormuz, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning said on Tuesday at a regular press conference that energy security is of great importance to the global economy, and all parties have the responsibility to ensure stable and smooth energy supplies.
  • 'Law of jungle': China says Israeli-US aggression against Iran must stop Press TV 03 Mar 2026 -- Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi condemned the US-Israeli aggression against Iran during a recent phone conversation with his French counterpart, Jean-Noel Barrot.
  • China Calls for Ensuring Safety of Navigation in Strait of Hormuz - Foreign Ministry Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- China calls on all parties to ensure the safety of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz and prevent a negative impact on the global economy, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning said on Tuesday.
  • Wang Yi Has a Phone Call with Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar PRC MofA 03 Mar 2026 -- On March 3, 2026, Member of the Political Bureau of the CPC Central Committee and Foreign Minister Wang Yi had a phone call with Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar upon request.
  • Chinese envoy strongly condemns and firmly opposes attacks on schools at a UN meeting presided by US first lady Global Times 03 Mar 2026 -- Fu Cong, China's permanent representative to the UN, said that China strongly condemns the targeting of children in attacks and urges parties to the conflict to fulfill their obligations under international humanitarian law, at a UN Security Council (UNSC) meeting presided by US first lady Melania Trump on Monday.
  • Chinese Foreign Ministry responds intensively to Iran-related queries as US-Israeli military operation enters the third day Global Times 03 Mar 2026 -- As the US Israeli military operation against Iran entered its third day on Monday, fighting and mutual retaliatory attacks intensified, with rising casualties on all sides and growing risks of a wider regional war. Amid the tense situation, China has intensified diplomatic efforts.

  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Foreign Minister the Islamic Republic of Iran Abbas Araghchi Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 03 Mar 2026
  • Lavrov to Araghchi: US-Israeli Actions Undermine Int'l Law Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov and his Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi discussed the developments in the Middle East over the phone, following the armed aggression by the United States and Israel against Iran, according to the Russian Ministry of Foreign Affairs.
  • Putin Making Every Effort to Help Ease Tensions in Middle East - Kremlin Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- Russian President Vladimir Putin is making every effort to help ease tensions in the Middle East, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said on Tuesday.
  • Lavrov Says No Evidence of Iran Producing Nuclear Weapons Sputnik 03 Mar 2026 -- No one has yet seen evidence of Iran developing nuclear weapons, Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov said on Tuesday.

  • UK sends warship and drone-busting helicopters to the Eastern Mediterranean to protect Brits and allies in the region UK MOD 03 Mar 2026 -- HMS Dragon set to sail to the Eastern Mediterranean to defend British interests and support the collective self-defence of our allies.
  • Foreign Secretary statement on the ongoing situation in the Middle East UK FCDO 03 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Secretary Yvette Cooper reiterates the UK's top priority is the safety and security of British nationals in the Middle East
  • PM call with President Christodoulides of Cyprus: 3 March 2026 Gov.UK 03 Mar 2026
  • Britain not joining U.S., Israeli "offensive strikes" on Iran: PM People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- Britain is not joining the U.S. and Israeli "offensive strikes" on Iran, Prime Minister Keir Starmer said on Monday.

  • Current developments in the Middle East - The Iranian people have the right to determine their fate Germany - Federal Government 03 Mar 2026 -- In light of the developments resulting from the Israeli and American military strikes against Iran, the Federal Government remains in close contact with its allies and partners. Germany remains committed to peace and security in the region.

  • President of the Republic of Cyprus: Greece declares its unwavering support and paves the way for the EU. Cyprus and Greece are always part of the solution Republic of Cyprus 03 Mar 2026
  • Statements by the Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus, 2 March 2026 Republic of Cyprus 03 Mar 2026
  • Aboul Gheit holds telephone call with President Salam, affirms support for Lebanese Government's decisions League of Arab States 03 Mar 2026
  • Saudi Arabia Strongly Condemns Blatant Iranian Attack on US Embassy in Riyadh SPA 03 Mar 2026 -- The Kingdom of Saudi Arabia expressed its strongest condemnation of the Iranian attack targeting the US Embassy in Riyadh. It affirmed that the repetition of this cowardly and unjustified attack blatantly violates all international norms and laws, including the 1949 Geneva Conventions and the 1961 Vienna Convention on Diplomatic Relations, which grant immunity to diplomatic premises and personnel even during armed conflict
  • Taiwan condemns Iran's indiscriminate attacks on Middle East countries CNA 03 Mar 2026 -- Taiwan's Ministry of Foreign Affairs (MOFA) has condemned Iran for its "indiscriminate attacks" against countries in the region, while reiterating that it has no immediate plans to conduct mass evacuations of more than 3,000 Taiwanese nationals there.
  • Military ops vs. Iran to last until 'regime change' comes - envoy Philippine News Agency 03 Mar 2026 -- The joint Israel-United States military operation against Iran will continue until it removes the "Iranian regime, aiming to annihilate Israeli," Israel Ambassador to the Philippines Dana Kursh said Tuesday.
  • Prime Minister Carney speaks with President of the United Arab Emirates His Highness Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan Prime Minister of Canada 03 Mar 2026
  • SCO member states express grave concern over developments in Middle East, attack against Iran People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- The member states of the Shanghai Cooperation Organization (SCO) express grave concern over developments in the Middle East and the armed attack against Iran, said an SCO statement regarding the situation in Iran released on Monday.
  • "We side with the resolution of problems through dialogue and diplomacy" Presidency of The Republic of Turkey 03 Mar 2026 -- Speaking at an iftar with deputies, President Erdoğan said: "We are never impartial regarding the matters concerning our region and humanity. We are not impartial regarding the incidents that disturb the peace of our neighbors as well as our brothers and sisters. We are not impartial regarding the issues that threaten the future of the entire world. On the contrary, we as Türkiye side with peace and quiet, tranquility and stability, solidarity and cooperation. We side with universal values, justice and development. We side with the resolution of problems through dialogue and diplomacy. We side with negotiation against conflicts, and peace against war."
  • The President of Ukraine and the President of the UAE Discussed the Situation in the Middle East and the Gulf Region President of Ukraine 03 Mar 2026

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Space Force strengthens partnerships at 45th Cobra Gold United States Space Force 03 Mar 2026 -- Space Force Guardians are participating in the 45th iteration of Cobra Gold for the first time in the exercise's history, marking a milestone for the service and further integrating space as a warfighting domain within one of the Indo-Pacific's largest multinational exercises, Feb. 23 to March 6.
  • Exercise Panamanian Partnership 26 USMC News 03 Mar 2026 -- U.S. Marines with 2nd CEB conducted bilateral training alongside Panamanian security institutions during Panamanian Partnership 26-3A from Jan. 10-Feb. 26, 2026. The purpose of the partnership and training was to reinforce readiness and interoperability through combined training in dense jungle terrain and austere range environments.

  • NATO Launches LOYAL LEDA 2026, a Multi-Domain Command Post Exercise NATO Allied Land Command 03 Mar 2026 -- March 3, 2026, NATO Allied Land Command (LANDCOM) officially launched LOYAL LEDA 2026, a major multi-domain exercise that trains and evaluates NATO Warfighting Corps Headquarters.
  • NATO begins scheduled land focused combat simulation across Europe NATO Allied Land Command 03 Mar 2026 -- NATO Allied Land Command began a scheduled exercise March 03 across nine Alliance countries to train and evaluate the ability of NATO Corps-level headquarters to execute the Alliance's integrated defense plans.
  • NATO Secretary General praises North Macedonia's contributions to the Alliance and stability in the Western Balkans NATO 03 Mar 2026 -- On Tuesday (3 March 2026), NATO Secretary General, Mark Rutte, visited North Macedonia. He met with President, Gordana Siljanovska-Davkova, Prime Minister, Hristijan Mickoski, and the President of the Assembly, Afrim Gashi.
  • Allies and partners gather in Berlin for NATO's 20th annual Arms Control and WMD Conference NATO 03 Mar 2026 -- On Tuesday (3 March 2026), NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte and the State Secretary of the German Federal Foreign Office Géza Andreas von Geyr, opened the 20th annual NATO Conference on Arms Control, Disarmament and Weapons of Mass Destruction (WMD) Non-Proliferation.

  • Exclusive: A General's Correspondence Details The Wartime Role Of Graft In The Russian Military RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- "War is war, but don't forget about the cash. Get yours," a Russian officer texted to a subordinate who was about to succeed him as commander of a division fighting in Ukraine, apparently advising him to take advantage of the moneymaking opportunities presented by the position.
  • Pacific Fleet's ship detachment goes to sea after business call to Malaysia's port Russia MoD 03 Mar 2026 -- The Pacific Fleet's ship detachment, including the corvettes Soversheny and Rezky, as well as the Pechenga medium marine tanker, completed a business call at the port of George Town (Malaysia).

  • 100,000 UAH during medical treatment: key information on payments for wounded service members Ukraine MOD 03 Mar 2026

  • Important decision for defence: Ukraine and Finland strengthen cooperation Ukraine MOD 03 Mar 2026
  • MoD inks Rs 5,083 crore contracts for ALH Mk-III (MR) & VL-Shtil missiles India PIB 03 Mar 2026 -- Ministry of Defence, on March 03, 2026, signed contracts worth a total of Rs 5,083 crore for the acquisition of six Advanced Light Helicopters (ALH) Mk-III (Maritime Role) for the Indian Coast Guard and Surface-to-Air Vertical Launch - Shtil missiles for the Indian Navy
  • CONTRACT FOR 04 X 500T SELF PROPELLED FUEL BARGES FOR INDIAN NAVY WITH M/S SHOFT SHIPYARD PRIVATE LIMITED, THANE India PIB 03 Mar 2026 -- A contract for construction of 04 X 500T Self Propelled Fuel Barges has been concluded with M/s Shoft Shipyard Private Limited, Thane (MSME Shipyard) on 02 Mar 2026.

  • IMOD Director General Held Security Situational Assessment with CEOs of Israel's Major Defense Industries Israel MOD 03 Mar 2026 -- Israel Ministry of Defense (IMOD) Director General, Maj. Gen. (Res.) Amir Baram, held a security situational assessment with the CEOs of Israel's major defense industries and senior Ministry officials.

  • Statement following the Nepalese Supreme Court's Judgment on Gurkha Pensions UK MOD 03 Mar 2026 -- Statement following the Nepalese Supreme Court's Judgment on Gurkha Pensions

  • HNLMS Evertsen to be deployed to the Mediterranean Netherlands Ministry of Defence 03 Mar 2026

  • Opening Speech of State Secretary Dr. Géza Andreas von Geyr "20th NATO Conference on Weapons of Mass Destruction‚ Arms Control, Disarmament and Non-Proliferation" Germany Federal Foreign Office 03 Mar 2026

  • Foreign Ministry delivers note to the Russian Embassy regarding a breach of procedural rules in Estonian territorial waters Estonia MFA 03 Mar 2026 -- Today, 3 March, the Estonian Ministry of Foreign Affairs summoned the chargé d'affaires of the Russian Federation to deliver a note concerning the proper procedural rules for the movement of Russian icebreakers in Estonian territorial waters.

  • Polish-Slovak Defence-Industrial Dialogue in Bratislava Poland - Ministry of National Defence 03 Mar 2026 -- On March 3, in Bratislava, the Deputy Prime Minister-Minister of National Defence Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysz, together with the Deputy Prime Minister-Minister of Defence of Slovakia, Robert Kaliňák, took part in the Polish-Slovak Defence-Industrial Dialogue 2026.

  • Air Force, Navy prep for possible repatriation missions in Mideast Philippine News Agency 03 Mar 2026 -- The Philippine Air Force and Philippine Navy are preparing assets in case the government orders the repatriation of overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) amid the Middle East conflict.
  • PH Navy: No 'marked dip' in allies' support despite Mideast conflict Philippine News Agency 03 Mar 2026 -- The Philippine Navy sees no "marked dip" in support from allies, including the United States, despite the latest Middle East conflict, a senior official said Tuesday.
  • Teodoro: No direct military threat to PH from Middle East conflict Philippine News Agency 03 Mar 2026 -- Department of National Defense (DND) Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. on Tuesday dismissed concerns that the Philippines could be dragged into the escalating conflict in the Middle East due to its alliance with the United States (US), saying such fears are unfounded.

  • Chinese ships in 4 WPS features 'doubles' in last week of February Philippine News Agency 03 Mar 2026 -- The Philippine Navy monitored 34 Chinese naval and coast guard vessels in four key features of the West Philippine Sea from Feb. 22 to March 1, an official said Tuesday.

  • Afghanistan: UN experts condemn Taliban's surging use of corporal punishment OHCHR 03 Mar 2026 -- The Taliban's increasing use of judicially-sanctioned corporal punishment, inflicted in public, often for so called moral crimes in Afghanistan, violates international human rights law, UN experts* warned today.
  • WFP warns of deepening crisis in Afghanistan as insecurity flares on eastern, southern and western border WFP 03 Mar 2026 -- Afghanistan is seeing an escalation of insecurity on its borders— increased fighting on the eastern and southern frontier with Pakistan, and ongoing violence in Iran. This renewed fighting is putting immense pressure on communities already vulnerable and worn down by years of crisis, conflict and chaos.

News Reports

  • Foreign National Sentenced to 20 Years in Prison for Conspiring to Traffic Nuclear Materials, Narcotics, and Firearms US Dept. of Justice 03 Mar 2026 -- Today, Takeshi Ebisawa, a Japanese national, was sentenced to 20 years in prison for his participation in a conspiracy to traffic nuclear materials, including uranium and weapons-grade plutonium, from Burma to other countries, as well as his participation in international narcotics trafficking, weapons

  • Russian Space Agency Says It's Repaired Damaged Baikonur Launch Pad Ahead Of Schedule RFE/RL 03 Mar 2026 -- Engineers have repaired a badly damaged launch pad at the Baikonur cosmodrome, Russia's space agency said, averting a potentially longer-term problem for supplying the International Space Station.
  • Meeting with Head of the Federal Treasury Roman Artyukhin President of Russia 03 Mar 2026 -- The President held a working meeting with Head of the Federal Treasury Roman Artyukhin to discuss the performance of the treasury system in 2025 and its future development.

  • What to watch at China's "two sessions" as new five-year plan begins People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- This year's "two sessions" -- the annual meetings of China's top legislature and top political advisory body -- are set to open at a pivotal moment. As the world's second-largest economy embarks on the inaugural year of its 15th Five-Year Plan (2026-2030) period, these gatherings in Beijing will serve both as a review of past achievements, and as a strategic compass guiding the nation's future development.
  • Foreign Ministry Spokesperson Mao Ning's Regular Press Conference on March 3, 2026 PRC MofA 03 Mar 2026
  • China will take necessary measures to safeguard energy security, FM on claims that US actions in Venezuela, Iran could impact China's oil supply, weaken its diplomatic partners Global Times 03 Mar 2026 -- China will take necessary measures to safeguard its own energy security, said Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Mao Ning on Tuesday, in response to a reporter's question that some analysts and officials in Asia claimed that US actions in Venezuela and Iran could impact China's oil supply and weaken China's diplomatic partners.
  • China implements measures to counter Japan's accelerating remilitarization People's Daily 03 Mar 2026 -- China's Ministry of Commerce has announced the placement of 20 Japanese entities involved in enhancing military capabilities on its export control list. A further 20 Japanese entities, where the end-users and end-uses of dual-use items cannot be verified, have been added to a watch list.

  • Taiwan-U.S. trade deal still awaiting U.S. notification: Premier CNA 03 Mar 2026 -- Taiwan is awaiting official notification from the United States regarding the status of the Agreement on Reciprocal Trade (ART) after the U.S. Supreme Court ruled President Donald Trump's "reciprocal" tariffs unconstitutional.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 03 Mar 2026

  • President Lee 'respects' NK regime, eyes future with Japan KOREA.net 03 Mar 2026 -- President Lee Jae Myung on March 1 said he respects North Korea's system and will maintain cooperative relations with Japan.

  • IRAQ - M. JEAN- NOEL BARROT'S CONVERSATION WITH THE PRESIDENT OF THE KURDISTAN REGIONAL GOVERNMENT OF IRAQ (3 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 03 Mar 2026
  • China - Conversation between M. Jean-Noël Barrot and his counterpart, Mr Wang Yi (3 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 03 Mar 2026 -- M. Jean-Noël Barrot, Minister for Europe and Foreign Affairs, spoke on the telephone yesterday to Mr Wang Yi, Director of the Office of the Central Foreign Affairs Commission of the Chinese Communist Party and Minister of Foreign Affairs of the People's Republic of China.

  • Lebanon - m. Jean- Noël Barrot's conversation with the lebanese prime minister (3 March 2026) France Ministry for Europe and Foreign Affairs 03 Mar 2026

  • Transcript of Special Media Briefing by MEA on the Official Visit of Prime Minister of Canada to India (March 02, 2026) India MEA 03 Mar 2026
  • Prime Minister speaks with Amir of Qatar India PIB 03 Mar 2026 -- The Prime Minister, Shri Narendra Modi spoke with H
  • Prime Minister speaks with Crown Prince of Kuwait India PIB 03 Mar 2026 -- The Prime Minister, Shri Narendra Modi, had a productive telephone conversation with H
  • Prime Minister speaks with His Majesty Sultan of Oman India PIB 03 Mar 2026 -- The Prime Minister, Shri Narendra Modi spoke with His Majesty Sultan Haitham bin Tarik and exchanged views on recent developments in West Asia

  • Phone conversation between the Foreign Ministers of Armenia and Oman Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Armenia 03 Mar 2026 -- On March 2, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Armenia Ararat Mirzoyan had a phone conversation with Minister of Foreign Affairs of Oman Sayyid Badr bin Hamad bin Hamood Albusaidi.
